query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS terminal_messages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  citations JSON,
  suggested_actions JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QmWxs7iH8DQva8.5d87819da4f6 --database J2wS2ZoP78AcJaejkgQxeA --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS terminal_messages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  role VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  citations JSON,
  suggested_actions JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
